creator: db@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #11)

You are right. It must be a zombie dependency from gnuradio 3.7 (I'll have to check). Checking https://www.gnuradio.org/doc/doxygen/build_guide.html I see no mention of ephem. A poudriere run without ephem ran fine. I'll double check then commit.
